<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2014">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div>

    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2014  12:16</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2014">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2014  13:45</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Resilience is part of the survival of the fittest formula--make sure you remain adaptable.&quot;</div>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2014">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2014  14:08</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>

    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2014  15:40</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Any and all weather events are used by the GLOBAL WARMING HOAXSTERS to justify higher taxes to save our planet! They don&#x27;t believe it $$$$!&quot;</div>
